spec.title: Disk Utilization
spec.description: Percentage of filesystem space used for each mounted device

spec.expr: ((node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance="localhost:9100", job="node_exporter", device!~'rootfs'} - node_filesystem_avail_bytes{instance="localhost:9100", job="node_exporter", device!~'rootfs'}) / node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance="localhost:9100", job="node_exporter", device!~'rootfs'}) * 100

spec.title: Exporter Memory Usage
spec.description: Tracks the memory usage of the process exposing this metric (e.g., node_exporter), including current virtual memory and maximum virtual memory limit
